transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Have you made an appointment at the tutoring center for calculus?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. My last quiz didn't go very well, so I want some extra help before the next one.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the woman make the appointment?

questions.prompt: Why did the woman make the appointment?

choices.text: She wants extra help before her next quiz.
She needs to register for calculus.
She is applying to be a tutor.

questions.explanation: She says her last quiz did not go well and she wants extra help before the next one.
questions.evidence: I want some extra help before the next one.
